title: AI Intrusion Detection System
description: Built a real-time intrusion detection system using Random Forest and Scapy to detect malicious traffic. Integrated FastAPI, WebSockets, and a React SOC dashboard for live monitoring with automated firewall responses. The model achieved approximately 89.8% classification accuracy on the UNSW-NB15 dataset.

title: Enterprise Cryptocurrency Exchange
description: Developed a hybrid database cryptocurrency exchange featuring Oracle transactional storage, MongoDB analytics, stored procedures, triggers, ACID transactions, and an automated order-matching engine with price-time priority.

title: Cloud Native Todo
description: Designed and deployed a containerized full-stack Todo application on Microsoft Azure using Azure App Service, Azure Static Web Apps, Docker, Azure DevOps, and GitHub Actions for automated CI/CD.

title: BookMind AI
description: Built an AI-powered personalized book recommendation platform using OpenAI, tRPC, TypeScript, structured JSON outputs, and intelligent reader profiling to generate personalized reading recommendations.

title: Real-Time Voice Translator
description: Engineered a multilingual voice communication platform combining speech recognition, translation, text-to-speech, and WebRTC to enable low-latency multilingual conversations.

title: Tournament Tree Visualizer
description: Created an interactive visualization of the Tournament Tree Sort algorithm with step-by-step animations, time-complexity analysis, and educational controls demonstrating an O(n log n) sorting process.

title: RISC-V Processor
description: Implemented a 5-stage pipelined RISC-V processor with forwarding logic, hazard detection, and branch handling to improve instruction throughput while maintaining execution correctness.

title: Network Infrastructure
description: Designed a scalable online learning network with VLAN segmentation, DNS-based load balancing, QoS for live video, redundancy, and router-on-a-stick architecture using Cisco Packet Tracer.
